title: Family
content:
I'm going to embarass myself today. These photos were taken on October 22 during the party for my mother's sister birthday. :D

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/11/family/01.jpg)

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/11/family/02.jpg)

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/11/family/03.jpg)

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/11/family/04.jpg)

I've always known that I've a rather big family. I don't even know them all. --"

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/11/family/05.jpg)

Good day~
